name: Agudo

skills.name: Mountain Encounter
skills.description: Replaces Recovery with Release. Upon releasing monsters, they grant her Gold, EXP, and their respective blessing. Her Basic Attacks drop Seed Mines.

skills.name: Wild Growth
skills.description: Agudo grants Movement Speed and Health recovery to herself and summons in the target area, and summons multiple monsters at the center.

skills.name: Tumble, Furball!
skills.description: Rolls forward, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Gains immunity against 1 hard crowd control, and damages and launches enemies hit.

skills.name: Gorge Mobilization
skills.description: Summons Furball to leap to the target location, inflicting damage and crowd control. Furball then fights independently.

skillsZh.name: 山林奇緣
skillsZh.description: 阿古朵將恢復替換為放生，放生後野怪會贈與金幣、經驗和對應野怪的祝福。阿古朵的普攻會掉落雷種。

skillsZh.name: 野蠻生長
skillsZh.description: 阿古朵使區域內自身和召喚物獲得加速和回復生命值，並在中心召喚多隻野怪。

skillsZh.name: 翻滾吧！球球
skillsZh.description: 阿古朵翻滾前進，期間免疫一次硬控，對觸碰到的敵人造成傷害並擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 峽谷總動員
skillsZh.description: 阿古朵召喚球球衝鋒到指定地點，造成傷害和控制，並在之後獨自作戰。

tips: Build: Rapacious Bite, Doomsday, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 阿古朵（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 50.9%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：貪婪之噬、末世、不祥徵兆.

patchHistory.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistory.change: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.

patchHistory.change: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: As a jungler with a rather unique design, Agudo and her partner Furball perform well when supporting other heroes and tanking damage. But we realized that Furball's damage is lacking. Since Furball has to fight and carry Agudo around the map, we've fed it some extra snacks to bulk up and improve the duo's strength.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

patchHistoryZh.change: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: As a jungler with a rather unique design, Agudo and her partner Furball perform well when supporting other heroes and tanking damage. But we realized that Furball's damage is lacking. Since Furball has to fight and carry Agudo around the map, we've fed it some extra snacks to bulk up and improve the duo's strength.

faqs.question: Is Agudo good in current season?
faqs.answer: Agudo is Tier B Marksman with 50.9% win rate, 0.45% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Agudo build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Rapacious Bite, Doomsday, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Agudo?
faqs.answer: Pick Ata, Han Xin. Strong into Kongming, Daji.

faqsZh.question: 阿古朵 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 阿古朵 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.9%、選取 0.45%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 阿古朵 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：貪婪之噬、末世、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 阿古朵？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ata、Han Xin。阿古朵 克制 Kongming、Daji。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Daji. Weak into: Ata, Han Xin.

guide.overview: Agudo is a Medium Marksman (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.9% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, then complete Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Agudo's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Wild Growth → Tumble, Furball! → Seed Mines → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Seed Mines (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Tumble, Furball! provides mobility or stick—max first. Wild Growth second for damage. Seed Mines on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Wild Growth → Tumble, Furball! → Seed Mines → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Seed Mines after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Agudo sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Agudo vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Agudo has +2.6% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Agudo when you need Jungling identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Agudo vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Agudo has +1.8% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Agudo when you need Jungling identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Agudo excels into Kongming, Daji. Avoid blind picking into Ata, Han Xin without team peel.
